title: Crop Growth Indicator
description: A simple resource pack to indicate how grown a crop is!
body:
# Crop Growth Indicator

This simple resource pack adds a colored indicator to several plants to let you know what stage of growth they are at.

It does this for the following plants:
- Beetroots
- Carrots
- Cocoa Pods
- Nether Wart
- Pitcher Plants
- Potatoes
- Sweet Berries
- Torchflowers
- Wheat

## Quick Note

You may use these textures in other packs or whatever, but linking back to this Modrinth page would be appreciated.

## Join My Discord

- Make suggestions, report issues, etc.
- View my to-do list with all planned future updates and new packs
- Might get early access to new packs in future

https://discord.gg/TkFb7V8Bya
